---
name: physics-publication
description: "Use when adding or changing any Fullmag physics or numerical capability and you need to create or update a docs/physics note in a scientific-publication style before implementation."
---

# Physics publication workflow

This skill exists to enforce the golden rule: physics first, implementation second.

## Use this skill for

- exchange, DMI, demag, anisotropy, Zeeman,
- mesh and geometry semantics,
- time integration,
- projection operators,
- FEM/FDM/hybrid interpretation differences,
- validation and benchmark planning.

## Required outputs

- target `docs/physics/<topic>.md` file or update,
- equations and symbol definitions,
- assumptions and units,
- Python API / `ProblemIR` / planner implications,
- completeness checklist across the whole stack,
- validation plan,
- explicitly deferred work.
